CREATE TABLE test_operators (id Int32, a Float64, b Float64);
SELECT id FROM test_operators WHERE a > b;
SELECT id, a, b FROM test_operators WHERE a > b ORDER BY a DESC;
SELECT id FROM test_operators AS t1 WHERE exists (SELECT * FROM test_operators AS t2 WHERE t1.a > t2.b);
SELECT id FROM (SELECT a, b FROM test_operators) AS subquery WHERE a > (SELECT AVG(b) FROM test_operators);
SELECT id FROM test_operators WHERE a > (SELECT MAX(b) FROM test_operators) AND b < 10;
CREATE TABLE test_operators2 (id Int32, value Float64);
SELECT t1.id FROM test_operators t1 JOIN test_operators2 t2 ON t1.a > t2.value WHERE t2.value < 10;
SELECT t1.id FROM test_operators t1, test_operators2 t2 WHERE t1.a > t2.value AND t1.b < t1.a ORDER BY t1.a;
